No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (4.3) and develops basic language skills (literacy, 4.6). Content on Korean culture, food, and places also fosters appreciation for cultural diversity (4.7).
evidence: 具備人文素養及知識 Humanity literacy & science
課程目標與學習成效Course Objectives & Learning Outcomes

Gender Equality.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Course content introduces Korean cultural and shopping districts (Insa-dong, Dongdaemun Market), which indirectly promotes awareness of local culture and products, aligning with sustainable tourism (Target 8.9).
evidence: 仁寺洞-去了仁寺洞買禮物
東大門市場-請去東大門市場看看

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course objective to '具備電腦打字的基本能力' (basic computer typing skills) provides a minimal, indirect link to increasing access to information and communications technology (Target 9.c).
evidence: 具備電腦打字的基本能力

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The vocabulary lesson on 'foreigner registration card' (外國人登錄證) provides a tangential link to understanding aspects of migration and mobility (Target 10.7).
evidence: 外國人登錄證-這是草小姐的外國人登錄證

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course introduces specific cultural and historical sites in Korea (Insa-dong, Daehangno), fostering an appreciation for and awareness of safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
evidence: 仁寺洞-去了仁寺洞買禮物
大學路-我最喜歡的地方是大學路

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: Course topics like 'hiking' (登山) and 'parks' (公園) provide a weak, indirect link to human interaction with and appreciation for terrestrial ecosystems (Target 15.1).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The syllabus explicitly states 'Respect Copyright', directly supporting the rule of law concerning intellectual property (Target 16.3).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。 Respect Copyright.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Learning a foreign language like Korean provides foundational skills for international communication, cross-cultural understanding, and knowledge sharing, directly supporting global partnerships (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
evidence: 旨在引導學生熟悉韓語之發音規則與基本詞彙、句構
